mapper.select: SELECT u.*, r.role_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON u.role_id = r.role_id WHERE u.username = #{username} AND u.password = #{password} AND u.status = 1
SELECT u.*, r.role_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON u.role_id = r.role_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user(username, password, real_name, role_id, phone, email, status) VALUES(#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{roleId}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET password = #{password} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
